violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop must be stored in a container that is easy to clean after the scoop has been used. Do not store scoop on top of ice machine without container.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop found laying in sink.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil Scoop for sugar was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Handle must be out of product when being stored with sugar.
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
